'''Angrail Ryhl''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Archaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeologist]]. During the course of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he discovered the [[Ch'hosk Cave Drawings]] on [[Antmuel VI]].

{{Char-stub}}
